maisi_ct_generative.model_name: MAISI - Medical AI for Synthetic Imaging
maisi_ct_generative.description: A generative AI model for creating high-resolution 3D CT images with controllable body region, spacing, and anatomical annotations. Uses latent diffusion models to generate synthetic medical imaging data for training and research.
papers: Generative AI for Medical Imaging: MAISI enables high-fidelity 3D CT synthesis
maisi_ct_generative.readme:
MAISI - Medical AI for Synthetic Imaging

MAISI is a generative AI model that creates high-resolution 3D CT images with controllable body region, spacing, and anatomical annotations.

Key Features

  • High-resolution 3D CT image generation
  • Controllable body region and spacing
  • Anatomical annotation generation
  • Based on latent diffusion models

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with support for CT generation

vista3d.description: Versatile Imaging SegmenTation and Annotation model for interactive 3D medical image segmentation. Supports automatic, point-prompt, and class-based segmentation modes with 127 anatomical classes.
papers: VISTA-3D: Versatile Imaging SegmenTation and Annotation for 3D medical images
vista3d.readme:
VISTA-3D

Interactive 3D medical image segmentation model supporting multiple segmentation modes.

Capabilities

  • Zero-shot segmentation
  • Interactive point prompts
  • 127 anatomical classes
  • Automatic and semi-automatic modes

swin_unetr_btcv_segmentation.description: Swin Transformer-based architecture for multi-organ segmentation on the BTCV (Beyond the Cranial Vault) challenge dataset. Achieves state-of-the-art results using self-supervised pre-training.
papers: Swin UNETR: Swin Transformers for Semantic Segmentation of Brain Tumors in MRI Images
Self-Supervised Pre-Training of Swin Transformers for 3D Medical Image Analysis
swin_unetr_btcv_segmentation.readme:
SwinUNETR BTCV Multi-Organ Segmentation

State-of-the-art multi-organ segmentation model using Swin Transformers.

Performance

  • 13-organ segmentation on BTCV dataset
  • Self-supervised pre-training on 5050 CT scans
  • Top results on multiple benchmarks

spleen_ct_segmentation.description: A UNet-based model for automated spleen segmentation from CT scans. Trained on the Medical Segmentation Decathlon dataset with high accuracy.
spleen_ct_segmentation.readme:
Spleen CT Segmentation

Automated spleen segmentation from CT scans using a 3D UNet architecture.

Details

  • Trained on Medical Segmentation Decathlon
  • 3D UNet architecture
  • Dice score > 0.96

pancreas_ct_dints_segmentation.description: Neural architecture search-based model for pancreas and tumor segmentation from CT scans using the DiNTS (Differentiable Neural Architecture Search) framework.
papers: DiNTS: Differentiable Neural Network Topology Search for 3D Medical Image Segmentation
pancreas_ct_dints_segmentation.readme:
Pancreas CT Segmentation with DiNTS

Automated pancreas and tumor segmentation using neural architecture search.

wholebody_ct_segmentation.description: Comprehensive whole-body CT segmentation model capable of identifying and delineating 104 anatomical structures from CT volumes.
wholebody_ct_segmentation.readme:
Whole Body CT Segmentation

Segment 104 anatomical structures from CT volumes.

lung_nodule_ct_detection.description: A detection model for identifying lung nodules in CT scans. Uses anchor-free detection with a 3D feature pyramid network for accurate nodule localization.
lung_nodule_ct_detection.readme:
Lung Nodule Detection

Automatic lung nodule detection from CT scans.

vila_m3_medical_vlm.description: A vision-language model fine-tuned for medical imaging tasks. Combines visual understanding with natural language processing for medical image interpretation and report generation.
papers: VILA-M3: Enhancing Vision-Language Models for Medical Imaging
vila_m3_medical_vlm.readme:
VILA-M3 Medical VLM

Vision-language model for medical image understanding and report generation.
